subject: Cross-lane terminology alignment status (2026-04-28)
body:
Status of terminology alignment requests sent to all lanes:

- SwarmMind: COMPLETE — no wording changes required; report delivered (terminology-alignment-report-20260428-signed.json).
- Archivist: SOURCE — updated SECURITY_POSTURE_LEVELS.md and TRUST_LAYER_V1.md (3-lane → multi-lane).
- Kernel: TASK DELIVERED — terminology-alignment-kernel-1777395955361-6f694a.json in processed; summary response PENDING (session was down).
- Library: TASK DELIVERED — terminology-alignment-library-1777395955376-bd8d3b.json in processed; summary response PENDING.

Action requested: When Kernel/Library sessions return, please prompt them to submit signed summaries to Archivist inbox for final consolidation.

convergence_gate.claim: Terminology alignment: SwarmMind complete; Archivist updated; Kernel/Library pending session recovery.
